untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires exact peak-matching logic and volume comparison (left top vs right top volume differential) that cannot be expressed with available indicators. The measure rule calculation requires tracking specific peak prices across multiple bars and comparing their volumes - this multi-bar state tracking with conditional logic based on volume position (left vs right) exceeds the single-bar indicator set. Recommend: (1) Pre-process chart to identify exact equal peaks, (2) Calculate confirmation level as lowest low between peaks, (3) Apply volume ratio comparison between the two peaks separately, (4) Use s1/s2 pivot as proxy for measure rule target.
